# Newtons NEET SS

Newtons NEET SS is an AI-powered, high-yield preparation and analytics platform designed specifically for medical professionals preparing for the NEET SS (Super Specialty) entrance exams. 

Developed by Newtons AI, this application combines active recall methodology, clinical clinical cases, image-based diagnostic questions (including histopathology, MRI brain scans, and chest radiographs), and personalized AI performance recommendations to streamline residency and super-specialty exam preparation.

## Core Features

- **Personalized AI Dashboard**: Tracks user performance across multiple core clinical and diagnostic disciplines, providing immediate metrics on accuracy, streaks, and overall preparation level.
- **Custom Grand Test (GT) Builder**: Allows users to customize testing sessions by selecting specific subjects, question limits, and modes (Timed vs. Untimed, Exam vs. Practice).
- **Interactive Question Engine**: High-yield questions paired with comprehensive diagnostic rationale, clinical highpoints, and active recall validations.
- **Visual Diagnostics QBank**: Specialized questions focused on chest radiographs (lobar consolidation/pneumonia), sagittal brain MRIs (neuroanatomy), and biopsy histology slides (Reed-Sternberg cells/Hodgkin Lymphoma).
- **AI Recommendation Engine**: Employs Gemini 3.5 Flash to evaluate active study histories and dynamically formulate highly personalized study strategies and topics to prioritize.

## Clinical Subjects Covered

- **Anatomy**: Focus on clinical neuroanatomy and neuroimaging structures.
- **Physiology**: Focus on CVS, vestibular, excretory systems, and general cellular mechanisms.
- **Biochemistry**: Carbohydrate, lipid, protein chemistry, and metabolic enzyme pathways.
- **Pathology**: Neoplasia, cellular injury, inflammation, and hematology biopsy slides.
- **Pharmacology**: Central Nervous System (CNS) therapeutics, cardiovascular drugs, and kinetics.
- **Microbiology**: General microbiology, immunology, and host-pathogen interactions.
- **Forensic Medicine & Toxicology**: Medical toxicology, thanatology, violent asphyxia, and injury diagnostics.
- **Social & Preventive Medicine (PSM)**: National health programs, biostatistics, epidemiology, screening of disease, and international health.
- **Medicine**: Cardiology, gastroenterology, endocrinology, neurology, nephrology, and pulmonology.
- **Surgery**: Urology, hepatobiliary, pancreatic systems, and gastrointestinal surgery.
- **OBGYN**: Obstetrics and gynecological pathology, and reproductive endocrinology.
- **Pediatrics**: Neonatology, pediatric emergencies, developmental milestones.
- **Psychiatry**: Behavioral health, clinical psychopharmacology, diagnostic criteria.
- **Dermatology**: Papulo-squamous disorders, sexually transmitted infections, and visual skin lesions.
- **Ophthalmology**: Diagnostic visual optics, retinal disorders, glaucoma.
- **ENT**: Ear, nose, throat clinical anatomy and common surgical pathologies.
- **Orthopedics**: Fracture diagnostics, skeletal radiology, and sports medicine.
- **Anesthesiology**: Pain management, pre-anesthetic protocols, active monitoring, and emergency medicine.
- **Radiology**: Genitourinary imaging, thoracic radiography, and scanning techniques.

## Developer & Integration Suite
- **Web App**: https://dr.newtons.in (Canonical)
- **App Store/Play Store TWA package**: `in.newtons.neetss.twa`
- **More suite modules**:
  - **Newtons AI Clinical App**: https://app.newtons.in - AI for diagnostic workflows, history taking, differential diagnostic mapping.
  - **Newtons Clinic Management System (CMS)**: https://cms.newtons.in - Integrated tool for independent clinicians.
  - **Newtons Hospital Management System (HMS)**: https://hms.newtons.in - Comprehensive hospital enterprise platform.
